# STD: Stable Triangle Descriptor for 3D place recognition

- **Work ID:** `LPR-026`
- **Reviewed version:** `arxiv:2209.12435`
- **Year / venue:** 2023 / ICRA
- **Relevance:** `core_lpr`
- **Representative tier:** `ordinary`
- **Links:** [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2209.12435) · [Reviewed official code](https://github.com/hku-mars/STD)

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI, NCLT, Complex Urban, KA Urban East, two park datasets, indoor Livox dataset — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–6, § Abstract;III. STD;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-10;Table I-II
- **input_unit:** LiDAR keyframe accumulated from consecutive scans: 10 frames on spinning-LiDAR benchmarks and 20 frames in Livox experiments — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–6, § Abstract;III. STD;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-10;Table I-II
- **invariances:** arbitrary rigid rotation and translation of the triangle attributes and keypoint geometry — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–4, § Abstract;III. STD;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-10;Table I-II
- **representation:** plane-region growing and boundary-projection keypoints, stable triangle descriptors with ordered side lengths and adjacent-plane normal dot products, hash-table voting and top-10 candidates, RANSAC and SVD pose, plane-overlap verification, optional plane-based STD-ICP — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–4, § Abstract;III. STD;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-10;Table I-II
- **uses_learning:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–6, § Abstract;III. STD;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-10;Table I-II
- **uses_sequence:** no, multiple scans are accumulated into one keyframe without temporal-order modeling — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–6, § Abstract;III. STD;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-10;Table I-II

> Information types distinguish author-reported facts, derived facts, researcher judgements, and agent inferences. The locator identifies the reviewed source; verbatim evidence remains in the private audit store.
